race.comment: Competitive affair. TEN CARAT LUCY (6) has been on the doorstep of another victory with six consecutive runner-up finishes this time in work and gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim. Has had a bit of a freshen up since the last outing and should be right there at the business end. HUMBLE HERO (1) grows a leg for rider Summers who is yet to miss a drum in seven steers. Racing very consistently of late and has to be included in calculations. The well-related BILLY BOOM (4) (half to G3 winner Metalart) saves his best form for his home circuit here and looks a must for the multiples. BELVEDERE MISS (10) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be slept on.
